demo.title: codegrid.sh
demo.code:
# Inside a CodeGrid pane — discover siblings and hand off work
list_agents()
read_pane(<session_id>)
message_agent(<session_id>, "[from claude] propose only, do not edit files: review auth.ts")

# Outside CodeGrid — drive the canvas over the local control socket
SOCK="$(cat ~/.codegrid/socket-path 2>/dev/null || echo ~/.codegrid/socket)"
printf '%s\n' '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"agent_list"}' | nc -U "$SOCK"

# Deep-link the installed app
open "codegrid://open?path=/abs/path/to/repo&type=codex"

setup: Download the macOS app and full docs at https://codegrid.app
Address other agents by `session_id` (stable), never by pane number (shifts)
